ModMetaData.name: Pawn Diary: SpeakUp
ModMetaData.author: aimmlegate
ModMetaData.description:
Adds dedicated SpeakUp support to Pawn Diary.
Five XML groups separate deep talks, jokes, prisoner conversations, thought reactions, and everyday chatter, while preserving SpeakUp's rendered dialogue as diary evidence. A reflection-bound optional layer also gathers reply chains into one pairwise conversation event when at least the configured number of replies was delivered.
The conversation layer defaults on and can be disabled or given a different minimum reply count in this adapter's settings. If SpeakUp changes its internal Talk API, only that layer disables itself; the XML groups continue to work. Requires Pawn Diary and SpeakUp.
